title: Centered stone bricks
description: Have you ever noticed that the square in the middle of chiseled stone bricks is not centered? Well, this pack fixes just that.
body:
I got really annoyed when I noticed that chiseled stone bricks' texture is not centered so I made this. This should work in all versions even though it might say your version is incompatible.

I made this by simply extending the middle square to be 4x4 instead of 3x3
